notes_zh:
- **修复** 粘贴超长 base64 图片（`data:image/...;base64,...`）时主线程卡死数秒的问题：现在入库时即解码为图片字节，搜索索引对超长内容设置了 256KB 上限，粘贴瞬间不再阻塞（#41，感谢 @miniers 的 PR）
- **优化** base64 data URI 类型的剪贴板条目：列表缩略图秒出（不再 favicon 闪现）、右下角显示 PNG/JPG 格式角标、属性面板补全尺寸 / 大小 / 格式信息
- **优化** 复制回 base64 data URI 时仍粘出原始 URI 字符串，保留前端 / Markdown / 邮件等场景的工作流
notes_en:
- **Fix** Pasting an oversized `data:image/...;base64,...` URI no longer freezes the main thread for several seconds — the URI is now decoded into image bytes at capture time and the search index skips content above 256 KB, so paste returns instantly (#41, thanks @miniers for the PR)
- **Improve** Inline base64 data URI clips now show their thumbnail synchronously (no favicon flicker), display a PNG/JPG format badge, and surface dimensions / size / format in the properties panel
- **Improve** Pasting a base64 data URI clip back returns the exact URI string the user copied, preserving CSS / Markdown / email workflows
